tweets.text:
16 days till Accelerate USA.

The network cleared a trillion last quarter, tokenized assets unlocked as collateral, and Solana tokens landed in front of hundreds of millions on X.

Here’s what happened over the week:

������ Headline News

- XRP went live on Solana via @Hex_Trust and @LayerZero_Core

- @kamino's PRIME Market surpassed $600M, becoming the largest RWA market in DeFi

- @totalistrading became the first YC startup to receive its $500K funding entirely in USDC settled on Solana

- @x debuted Cashtags with Solana tokens powered by @saydialect, @helius, @JupiterExchange, and @birdeye_data

������ Launches

- @SGB_app instituted zero fee 1:1 USD to USDC minting and conversion using Solana as the settlement rail

- @SolsticeFi integrated @global_dollar's USDG across its entire yield stack

- @crossmint revealed upcoming @Mastercard integration for AI agents via lobstercash on Solana

- @doublezero shipped Edge beta, delivering institutional-grade low-latency Solana shred market data

- @jup_lend unlocked @xStocksFi’s SPYx, QQQx, NVDAx, and TSLAx as collateral with up to 3.8x leverage

- RPC 2.0 went live, built with @triton_one, @Helius, @JupiterExchange, @anza_xyz, and @SolanaFndn

- @metaplex released Agent Tokens, facilitating agentic capital markets

- @byreal_io introduced RealClaw AI agent designed for passive yield generation

- @dflow unveiled Agent CLI for automated spot, equity, and prediction market execution

- @hylo_so premiered a new trading interface featuring liquidation resistant leverage

- @Titan_Exchange opened the DART API in public beta

- @atxp_ai moved to x402 and MPP on Solana, topping the agentic commerce leaderboards

- @craftsdev initiated the first raise with @refihub, a real-world energy project

- @elementaldefi announced V2, introducing isolated vaults

- @OVHcloud partnered with Solana, @SuperteamPOL, and @DegenHouse_ to provide dedicated cloud infrastructure for ecosystem builders

- @printr V2: Proof of Belief went live on Solana

- @HusherExchange rolled out instant private crypto transfers on Solana

- @clawpumptech deployed Eternal Agents, autonomous AI with DeFi

- @blankdotbuild launched Blank, a post-launch operating platform for tokens

- @JurassicFi opened waitlist for its dinosaur fossils tokenization platform

- @ClipStake_X exited beta having generated 2B+ views and distributing $400K

- @alphafcxyz rebranded Alfreton Town FC's home ground to Solana Stadium

- @hackerhouses scheduled a London Special Edition for November 1-12

������ Milestones

- Solana economic activity surpassed $1T in Q1 2026 for the first time

- @helium network daily users surpassed 3.4M

- @PreStocks volume surpassed $750M

- @humafinance's PST hits $156M in supply and 116K depositors

- @phygitals surpassed $180M volume on Solana

If you enjoyed this week’s newsletter, please share it with an RT.

This Week in the Virtuals Ecosystem ������

VIRTUALS
������ Virtuals Robotics showcased live to Malaysia’s Minister of Digital @GobindSinghDeo at the Base Builder’s Loft

������ Virtuals hit $4M in agent-to-agent revenue

������ $VIRTUAL is now live on @moonpay in the USA

������ Co-founder @ethermage joined @therollupco to discuss the $500M+ in agent-to-agent commerce and the long-term robotics vision

������ Virtuals Console supports Claude Opus 4.7

ECOSYSTEM
������ @OpenGradient is launching on Virtuals Protocol. Decentralized verifiable AI inference with 2M+ inferences already processed and onchain proofs for every model call.

������ @ArAIstotle updated its roadmap to prioritize narrative intelligence, Resolution Risk Index and Resolution Fragility Score in the Truth Terminal while expanding fact-checking to X Spaces, YouTube and long-form content.

������ @StrikeRobot_ai showcased how SR Agentic can now autonomously detect, track, and alert, identifies workers in protective gear, follows through dynamic environments, delivers real-time alerts on contact.

������ @Shekel_Agentic is migrating Rabbi Schlomo (the first fully agentic fund) to Virtuals Degen Arena.

������ @sibylcap scored 95.6% on the LongMemEval benchmark using a simple file-based memory architecture, ranking #2 on the community leaderboard with no vector stores or embeddings.

������ @DegenAI_0x dropped v1.3 changelog. Backtesting, Virtuals Degen Claw competition mode, smarter automations, automation sharing, public endpoints and major UX upgrades.

������ @Zyfai_ launched Agentic Treasury Management on ACP. Agents and robots can now deposit USDC, earn yield across Aave, Morpho, Euler, Compound, Spark and Wasabi while keeping instant withdrawals.

������ @reppo launched a $1M Builders Fund to support onchain Datanets that curate AI training data via prediction markets.

Agents keep shipping.
See you next week.

STILL HIRING

Prove you can build or sell.

Email me with @agentcashdev at shafu [at] merit [dot] systems

No forms, No Becky from HR
@organ_danny Autonomous within bounds, yes. Don't give them your keys, and make sure spending limits are hard-coded somewhere or other.

No disagreement here. Even when there's a person closely behind the agents, even perhaps very involved and directing things, the way the agents themselves access resources is still fundamentally different and the human UX of subscriptions and signups goes out the window.
